sqlMap.select:
SELECT A.* FROM (SELECT *,@rownum:=@rownum+1 as rowNum FROM tbl_usermaster, (select @rownum:=0) tmp WHERE PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND (DISPLAYNAME LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%') OR DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%'))
ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC)A
WHERE rowNum > #rowNum#
LIMIT #listSize#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND (DISPLAYNAME LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%') OR DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT('%' ,#pSearchText#, '%'))
ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC
SELECT * FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND cn = #userID#

select.isEqual: SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN)) AS ISLAST, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.CN = #deptID#)) AS EXPAND, CASE WHEN (USEFLAG = '' OR USEFLAG IS NULL) THEN '1' ELSE '0' END DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #deptID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN)) AS ISLAST, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.CN = #deptID#)) AS EXPAND, CASE WHEN (USEFLAG = '' OR USEFLAG IS NULL) THEN '1' ELSE '0' END DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 IN (SELECT C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER C WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #deptID#) ORDER BY A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.DISPLAYNAME

sqlMap.select: SELECT CN as DEPTID, CASE WHEN (DISPLAYNAME$lang$ = '' OR DISPLAYNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME$lang$ END DEPTNAME, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = A.CN)) AS ISLAST, (SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER B WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.CN = #deptID#)) AS EXPAND, CASE WHEN (USEFLAG = '' OR USEFLAG IS NULL) THEN '1' ELSE '0' END DEPTTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as HIGHDEPTID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #deptID# ORDER BY A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.DISPLAYNAME
